title: T-026 — Site config override modal MS-102 (dynamic-field form by setting_key)
prompt:
# T-026 — Site config override modal

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10B MS-102, §13.2 (ADR-031 L2 override)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:472-512 (site_config_override_modal)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §M-08

## Goal
Per-setting override modal: pick setting_key, view L1 org default inline, set L2 override (input type adapts by key type), optional effective_from + notes. Clear Override reverts to L1 with audit entry.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/site-config-override-modal.tsx — shadcn Dialog with shadcn Select for setting_key, dynamic input (Input/Select/Checkbox) by config_schema.type, read-only L1 base card.
2. config_schema lookup: query `config_schema` table (existing, owned by 02-SET ADR-031) by setting_key — returns {type: 'string'|'number'|'select'|'boolean', options?: string[], description}.
3. Server Action upsertSiteConfigOverride({siteId, key, value, effectiveFrom, notes}):
   - Role gate: admin OR site_manager AT this site.
   - Upserts into site_settings (org_id, site_id, setting_key, setting_value, source='l2_override').
   - Audit_events row.
4. Server Action clearSiteConfigOverride({siteId, key}):
   - Sets source='default' (or deletes row depending on design — deletes per §10B 'reverts to L1 base immediately').
   - Audit_events row.
5. Tests: input type adaptation per key, role gate, L1 base displayed, Clear path audited.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/site-config-override-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_actions/upsert-site-config-override.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_actions/clear-site-config-override.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/sites/[siteId]/_components/__tests__/site-config-override-modal.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given modal opens, when compared to modals.jsx:472-512 (site_config_override_modal), then Setting select + L1 base card + dynamic input (Override Value) + Effective From + Notes + Save/Clear buttons match — RTL parity.
2. Given setting_key='fefo_strategy' is selected (config_schema.type='select', options=['FEFO','LIFO']), when modal renders, then Override Value is a shadcn Select with 2 options.
3. Given setting_key='quality_check_frequency' is selected (config_schema.type='number'), when modal renders, then Override Value is shadcn Input type='number'.
4. Given a user with role=site_manager at site_X submits upsert for site_Y, when Server Action runs, then UnauthorizedConfigOverride is thrown (V-MS-05 site scoping + role gate at primary site).
5. Given upsertSiteConfigOverride settles, when site_settings is queried, then exactly one row exists for (org_id, site_id, setting_key) with source='l2_override' and audit_events has 1 row 'site_config_override_set'.
6. Given clearSiteConfigOverride is invoked, when settles, then site_settings row for that key is deleted (or source set to 'default'); audit_events 'site_config_override_cleared' written.
7. Given the page is in withSiteContext(siteId=Y) but the modal tries to upsert siteId=X, when Server Action runs, then SiteContextMismatch is thrown (V-MS-16).

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + input type adaptation + role/site gate + L1 base displayed + Clear flow + V-MS-16 site mismatch before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run site-config-override-modal' + Playwright site-config-override.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:472-512 (site_config_override_modal).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode input types — must read from config_schema lookup (02-SET-owned).
- Do not allow site_manager to override at site they're not assigned to.
- Do not bypass V-MS-16 — siteId argument must match withSiteContext.
- Do not omit Clear Override audit row.
- Do not allow override for keys that are L1-only (config_schema.l2_overridable=false) — surface error.

Given user role=site_manager at site_X submits upsert for site_Y, when Server Action runs, then UnauthorizedConfigOverride thrown (V-MS-05 + role gate); AND given page in withSiteContext(siteId=Y) but modal tries siteId=X when Server Action runs then SiteContextMismatch thrown.
Given upsertSiteConfigOverride settles, when site_settings queried, then 1 row for (org_id, site_id, setting_key) source='l2_override' + audit_events 'site_config_override_set' written.
Given clearSiteConfigOverride invoked, when settles, then row deleted + audit_events 'site_config_override_cleared' written.
